title: Handing Over The Gun
content:
Kill me if you will not love me.
        Here are flints;
    Ram down the heavy bullet, little leopard,
        On the black powder.

    Only you must not shoot me through the head,
        Nor touch my heart;
    Because my head is full of the ways of you
        And my heart is dead.

    Song of Syria.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator) delivers a powerful performance in "Handing Over The Gun"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
